response:
Sec. 1  
[THE WRITER HAS TWO PUBLISHER OFFERS TO CONSIDER BASED ON THE BOOK'S SALES REVENUE.]  
Sec. 2  
[PUBLISHER A OFFERS A FLAT FEE OF 3000 DOLLARS PLUS 5 PERCENT OF THE SALES REVENUE.]  
Sec. 3  
[PUBLISHER B OFFERS A FLAT FEE OF 1500 DOLLARS PLUS 10 PERCENT OF THE SALES REVENUE.]  
Sec. 4  
[TO DETERMINE WHEN PUBLISHER A IS MORE LUCRATIVE, WE SET UP AN INEQUALITY.]  
Sec. 5  
[THE INEQUALITY IS 3000 PLUS 0.05X GREATER THAN 1500 PLUS 0.10X.]  
Sec. 6  
[SOLVING THE INEQUALITY GIVES 1500 GREATER THAN 0.05X OR X LESS THAN 30000.]  
Sec. 7  
[WITHIN THE ANTICIPATED RANGE OF 10000 TO 40000, PUBLISHER A IS BETTER FOR SALES BELOW 30000.]  
Sec. 8  
[THEREFORE, THE WRITER SHOULD CHOOSE PUBLISHER A IF SALES ARE BETWEEN 10000 AND 30000 DOLLARS.]
